description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows MinGW64 that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of two jobs: prepare-mingw64-libs and build-mingw64. The prepare-mingw64-libs job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, installs dependencies, downloads library sources, and builds required 3rd-party libraries (zlib, openssl, curl, and boost) for mingw64. The build-mingw64 job depends on the prepare-mingw64-libs job, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, loads external libraries, configures the build environment, and builds the project using cmake and make.
